name: F1-tree-service-production-shaped
description: Failed production-shaped Tree Service fixture — mixed customer/agent turns, multiple trees, quantity, height, agent urgency questions

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Hello, thanks for calling NorthStar Tree Service. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: Hi, I need to get some trees removed. I have four 120-foot trees leaning toward my house.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: I understand. Four white pines, about 120 feet each, leaning toward the house. Is this an emergency or a standard non-urgent request?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: No, it's not an emergency — they've been leaning for a while, I just want to get them taken care of before winter.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Got it. What's your name please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Thanks Christopher. And a phone number I can reach you at?
